prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GUNCLEANKIT-14PC Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Deluxe Gun Cleaning Kit in Canvas Pouch 14pc Description: Every responsible firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your weapons clean. With the ASR Outdoor 14 Piece Gun Cleaning Kit, you can ensure that your firearms are clean, polished, rust-free and dependable.

This set comes with 14 gun cleaning tools to keep your firearms in top shape. Inside the kit, you'll find 9 different sized brass punches, 3 double-ended bristle brushes, and 2 double-ended nylon picks. Brass punches are used to drive pins that hold guns together without marring the surface. The 3 brushes each have different bristle types for a variety of abrasiveness (copper, nylon, and brass) which will help remove rust, paint and other debris from your firearms.

All of the accessories included fit neatly inside of a sturdy black zippered canvas pouch, so you can easily bring your cleaning kit with you or add it to your range bag. The carry case will ensure that your tools and cleaning supplies stay organized during transit.

In addition to cleaning, polishing, removing rust or removing paint from your firearms, these cleaning tools are also great for hobbies, crafting and automotive hardware purposes. Make sure to keep this cleaning kit on hand before your next hunting trip, range session or hobby project. Search Terms: gun cleaning supplies cleaninng kits firearm brushes double ended hand tools soft bristle for nylon brush plastic copper abrasive scrubbing hunting Features: - VERSATILE GUN CLEANING KIT - Comes with Brushes, Brass Punches and Picks - 14 Piece Set - 9 DIFFERENT BRASS PUNCHES - 1/16", 5/64", 3/32", 1/8", 5/32", 3/16", 7/32", 1/4", 5/16" | Drive Pins to Hold Guns Together Without Marring Surfaces - DOUBLE-ENDED CLEANING BRUSHES - Copper, Nylon and Brass Brushes for Varying Levels of Abrasiveness | Remove Rust, Paint, and Residue from Firearms - NYLON PICKS - Strong Nylon Material Picks Ideal for Scraping and Removing Debris from Hard to Reach Places - BLACK CANVAS POUCH - All Accessories Fit Neatly Inside 9" x 5" Length Carry Pouch | Sturdy Zip Closure to Keep Supplies Organized === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 14-pc Gun Cleaning Kit with Canvas Pouch

tokens.name: Gun Cleaning Kit with Canvas Pouch

anthropic.title_differentiation: 9 Brass Punches, 3 Double-Ended Brushes, 2 Nylon Picks, Black Canvas Carry Pouch, Removes Rust And Paint

openai.title_differentiation: 9 Brass Punches, 3 Double-Ended Brushes, Nylon Picks, Black Canvas Pouch, Rust And Debris Removal
